violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed jalapeno poppers, mozzarella breadsticks stored on floor in walk in cooler.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Food was not marked with time cooked, served or discarded. Written log was not kept of cooked food with no time marking.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelves in walk in freezer made of exposed wood that stores food.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelves made of exposed wood in backroom that stores single use items.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. Mop stored in the mop bucket not in a self draining position.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use cups stored on floor. Single use items need to be stored 6 " off floor.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed debris build up on floors.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
